MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Shawn R. Miller, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: David Bongiovanni
Deborah Bjonerud, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Cam Huynh

RULING: After hearing, Plaintiff David Bongiovanni's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas For Business Records. is GRANTED - Subpoenas are limited to records for the last 10 years re: injured body parts. JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
